title: Settings
subtitle: Company-wide system configuration
errorLoad: Could not load settings. Please try again.

notifications.title: Reminders & notifications
notifications.description: When the system reminds about HR milestones
notifications.probationLeadHint: 1–30 days. Affects the dashboard and reminder emails.

regional.title: Regional defaults
regional.description: Applied to every user in the company
regional.defaultLanguageHint: Applied to users who never picked a language.

security.title: Security policy
security.forceSsoHint: When on, password login is rejected — except Super Admin (prevents lockout).

issuingEntities.title: Issuing entities
issuingEntities.description: Legal entities named on purchase orders (PO). Each entity prints its own logo and tax code.

empty.title: No entities yet
empty.description: Add your first entity to pick it when creating a purchase request.

fields.name: Entity name
fields.isDefaultHint: Pre-selected when creating a new request. Only one default per company.

form.createDescription: Declare the legal entity named on the PO.
form.editDescription: Update the entity's details and logo.

logo.label: Logo
logo.hint: PNG or JPEG, up to 2MB. Printed on the PO header.
logo.createHint: Save the entity first, then reopen it to upload a logo.
logo.errorType: Only PNG or JPEG images are allowed.

hide.title: Hide entity?
hide.description: "{{name}}" will no longer appear when creating new requests. Past requests that used it still print correctly.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Try again later.
